style_overrides.environment: quiet minimal interior, warm window light, plain plaster, pale wood / cream linen — NOT brutalist gym, NOT athletic wear, NO hoodie anywhere
style_overrides.color: warm earth (ecru/oat/taupe/charcoal) with optional muted coral-amber natural warmth — NOT acid lime, NOT cold green
style_overrides.lighting: single warm window source, soft falloff allowed
style_overrides.rationale: BRAND.md voice and visual rules call for natural-light minimalism, not gym-brutalism. Faceless rule + documentary discipline kept; gym setting and hooded motif removed entirely.
